description: Blueprint of core validation checks, yield calculations, and AI instructional rules

rules.name: Cron Daily Yield Distribution Formulas
edgeCaseRules: Weekend Reduced multiplier: dailyPercent = dailyPercent * weekendReducedMultiplier
Loss Days check: if (randomValue < lossChance) dailyPercent = -lossPercent

rules.name: MLM Level Dynamic Role Promotion Rules
eligibilityLogic: user.role === 'user' (only standard users are promoted, admin and other staff roles are ignored)
newLevel > minRankLevel (promoted only when exceeding base rank of the plan)

rules.name: Earning Type Unified Display Format
eligibilityLogic: If earning type is platform_fee/rewards/charity/developer_fee/liquidity_pool and it has depositId, map to 'Trade Bonus (<Type> Split)'
If earning type is platform_fee/rewards/charity/developer_fee/liquidity_pool and has no depositId, map to 'Referral Reward (<Type> Split)'
Otherwise map daily to 'Trade Bonus', referral to 'Referral Reward', and profit_share to 'Team Profit Share'

rules.name: Binary MLM Income Classification
eligibilityLogic: Isolate binary_pairing_bonus, binary_cycle_bonus, binary_flush_bonus, and all other binary_ prefixed types into 'binary' summary
Exclude binary prefixed types from the general 'bonus' summary aggregation
